scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n shared,ui,api,web -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "corepack pnpm --filter @smw/shared dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @smw/ui dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @smw/api dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @smw/web dev"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/web build
scripts.build:packages: corepack pnpm --filter @smw/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/ui build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/ui typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @smw/shared test && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/api test && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/api test:e2e && corepack pnpm --filter @smw/web test
